findings.title: [Freight] STUCK 6/15-17 run at Pueblo — PLAN (6/22): ship SOLO early next week (Mon/Tue ~6/29-30), do NOT wait for the 7/3 consolidated load
findings.detail: The run produced 6/15-17 was NOT collected on its 6/19 ship date (the miss that started all this). 3 measured pallets (BUF 52in/1,111 lb · GR 35in/713 lb · FO 59in/1,211 lb, ~3,035 lb). It's the relief valve for critically-low NYC inventory (<1 wk, losing sales). PLAN as of 6/22: since Run C now ships 7/3 (see below), the stuck run is DECOUPLED — ship it SOLO early next week (target Mon/Tue ~6/29-30) for fast relief; do NOT fold it into the 7/3 consolidated load (too long to wait). Carrier hunt: JEREMY at FFE (text contact, 'Real-Streeter', came through on the 6/19 run) is chasing his network but has NO truck yet as of 6/22; run parallel RLS/DTS quotes for an EARLY-NEXT-WEEK pickup (NOT Friday). Jeremy email NOT in system — need it from Kendall to send the written load tender. FK (Nathan) asked to stage the pallets for a Mon/Tue load. (owner: Kendall — book early-next-week carrier (Jeremy/FFE + RLS/DTS); send Jeremy email once address provided)

findings.title: [Packaging] Packaging reorder for the 7/13 run — Cary TUBS + LIDS are time-critical NOW (4-6 wk lead)
findings.detail: VERIFIED 6/21. Short for runs through 7/27: tubs ~11.7k, lids ~12.4k (Cary, 4-6wk lead → order NOW to land by 7/13), boxes ~1.4k, GR wrap ~3.3k + FO lid ~3.7k labels (ATL, 2-3wk). DRAFTS STAGED 6/21 (review + send): (1) Cary 15k tubs + 15k lids → Daniel Fountain + Samantha Silva (Samantha processes orders; Daniel went unresponsive last ask — both on it now). (2) Boxes 5,000 → Connor (Snyder = PCA, same supplier; NO order was in progress, so this is a real reorder). (3) ATL French Onion lids 6,000 → Callie (orders) + James (pricing). OPEN DECISION — GR WRAP: short per audit BUT well-stocked (5,050 on hand) AND under a possible reformulation hold (lemon→vinegar may change the ingredient declaration on the label) — DO NOT reorder GR wrap until Kendall confirms the GR formula/label is locked. ⚠ DELETE the earlier wrong ATL draft (plain email to James only). Also: (4) backordered 7,054 tubs (EST129593) shipped — confirm landed → move onOrder→onHand. ⚠ CAVEAT: on-hand is the stale ~6/1 FK count; the FK fresh-count request is also drafted — reconcile before fully trusting the shortfall. (owner: Kendall — review + send the 3 drafts; decide GR-wrap hold; delete the bad James draft)

findings.title: [Storage / Logistics] Carriacou (Brooklyn) warehouse — NEW storage option; Mendez holding space, needs date/time/# pallets (BLOCKED on securing a truck)
findings.detail: Kendall reached out to Carriacou (Brooklyn; contact Mendez) about storing product there — NOT previously used. Rationale: (1) unsure Localee's hub can receive from a Sprinter van; (2) wants inventory accessible for trade shows. Mendez (6/19) confirmed space IS available and needs the final date, time, and # of pallets; Kendall is sending a PO. Can't give those details yet because there is no truck/freight booked. NEXT: once a truck is secured (see the freight items above), send Mendez the date/time/pallets to lock the Brooklyn receiving. Jake also coordinated with Mendez. SPECS NOW KNOWN (John, 6/19): 3 pallets — P1 48x40x54 1111lb, P2 48x40x35 713lb, P3 48x40x59 1211lb. So #pallets (3) + dims are answered; only the truck + date/time remain. (owner: Kendall (give Mendez date/time once a truck is booked); Mendez/Carriacou holding the space)
